caption:
PANTRY CHAOS TO THE RESCUE! 🍞🥚

Who knew just eggs and bread could create so many delicious meals? When you're staring at an almost-empty fridge, don't panic! We've transformed these two pantry staples into FIVE different tasty dishes that will save your dinner (and breakfast, and lunch!).

Swipe through to discover simple recipes you can make right now with minimal ingredients. No special grocery run needed!

Which one are you trying first? Let us know below! 👇

Save this for your next "what's for dinner?" emergency!
hooks: Running low on groceries? We've got you covered!
Transform 2 simple ingredients into 5 delicious meals!
Eggs + bread = culinary magic you need to try!
platform_notes: This carousel works perfectly for Instagram as it provides immediate value with swipeable recipe content. The pantry chaos theme is highly relatable, especially with current economic challenges. The 5 distinct recipes showcase versatility and encourage saves for future reference. Consider adding the first recipe in the first image to increase engagement.

generation_request.notes: Pillar: pantry chaos. Ingredients: eggs, bread.

slides.image_prompt: Delicious Recipe 1 illustration, a beautifully plated dish made with eggs and bread, served on a white ceramic plate, appetizing presentation with vibrant garnishes, warm inviting lighting with soft shadows, 2D cartoon illustration aesthetic, bright vibrant colors, bold outlines, clean simple background with subtle texture, professional food art quality, appetizing and inviting presentation, top-down flat lay view slightly angled, plate centered in frame --ar 1:1

steps: Whisk eggs, milk, vanilla, and cinnamon in a shallow dish
Dip each bread slice in the mixture, coating both sides
Fry in buttered pan over medium heat until golden brown on both sides
Serve with maple syrup
recipe.proTip: Slightly stale bread works best as it absorbs the egg mixture without falling apart.

slides.image_prompt: Delicious Recipe 2 illustration, a beautifully plated dish made with eggs and bread, served on a white ceramic plate, appetizing presentation with vibrant garnishes, warm inviting lighting with soft shadows, 2D cartoon illustration aesthetic, bright vibrant colors, bold outlines, clean simple background with subtle texture, professional food art quality, appetizing and inviting presentation, top-down flat lay view slightly angled, plate centered in frame --ar 1:1

steps: Cut a circle in the center of each bread slice
Heat butter in a frying pan over medium heat
Place bread in pan and crack an egg into the center of each
Cook until egg is set to your liking, flipping once
recipe.proTip: Use the bread circles to make mini toast soldiers for dipping!

slides.image_prompt: Delicious Recipe 3 illustration, a beautifully plated dish made with eggs and bread, served on a white ceramic plate, appetizing presentation with vibrant garnishes, warm inviting lighting with soft shadows, 2D cartoon illustration aesthetic, bright vibrant colors, bold outlines, clean simple background with subtle texture, professional food art quality, appetizing and inviting presentation, top-down flat lay view slightly angled, plate centered in frame --ar 1:1

ingredients: 4 slices of bread, torn into pieces
steps: Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F)
Place bread pieces in a greased baking dish
Whisk together eggs, milk, cheese, herbs, salt, and pepper
Pour egg mixture over bread and bake for 35-40 minutes until set
recipe.proTip: Add any leftover veggies or cooked meats you have in the fridge for extra flavor!

slides.text: 🍳 RECIPE 4: EGG FRIED RICE WITH CROUTONS
slides.image_prompt: Delicious Recipe 4 illustration, a beautifully plated dish made with eggs and bread, served on a white ceramic plate, appetizing presentation with vibrant garnishes, warm inviting lighting with soft shadows, 2D cartoon illustration aesthetic, bright vibrant colors, bold outlines, clean simple background with subtle texture, professional food art quality, appetizing and inviting presentation, top-down flat lay view slightly angled, plate centered in frame --ar 1:1

steps: Heat oil in a wok or large frying pan
Add bread cubes and fry until golden, then remove
Scramble eggs in the same pan, then add rice and soy sauce
Stir in croutons and garnish with spring onions
recipe.proTip: This is perfect for using up leftover rice from yesterday's takeaway!

slides.image_prompt: Delicious Recipe 5 illustration, a beautifully plated dish made with eggs and bread, served on a white ceramic plate, appetizing presentation with vibrant garnishes, warm inviting lighting with soft shadows, 2D cartoon illustration aesthetic, bright vibrant colors, bold outlines, clean simple background with subtle texture, professional food art quality, appetizing and inviting presentation, top-down flat lay view slightly angled, plate centered in frame --ar 1:1

steps: Grease a baking dish and layer half the bread cubes
Sprinkle with half the cheese, then repeat layers
Whisk eggs, milk, mustard, salt, and pepper; pour over bread
Bake at 180°C (350°F) for 40-45 minutes until golden and set
recipe.proTip: Prepare this the night before and refrigerate. Just pop it in the oven in the morning!
